title: Inconsistent Cargo feature defaults: lichen-schc defaults to std, lichen-meshtastic defaults to alloc
description:
Most crates in the workspace have:
  [features]
  default = []

But two crates differ:

lichen-schc/Cargo.toml:
  default = ["std"]

lichen-meshtastic/Cargo.toml:
  default = ["alloc"]

What goes wrong: Users adding these crates as dependencies may not realize std or alloc is enabled by default. For embedded no_std builds, lichen-schc requires explicit default-features = false while other crates don't. This inconsistency in the workspace makes Cargo.toml setup error-prone.
